repo.description: EasyTransfer is designed to make the development of transfer learning in NLP applications easier.

terms.context_snippet: The literature has witnessed the success of applying deep Transfer Learning (TL) for many real-world NLP applications, yet it is not easy to build an easy-to-use TL toolkit to achieve such a goal. To bridge this gap, EasyTransfer is designed to facilitate users leveraging deep T…
